title: Manticore (creature)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|manticore}}
'''Manticore''' was what was once thought to be an extinct animal. Its picture was in the [[Holographic Zoo of Extinct Animals]], and remained there even after it was proven that the manticore was simply a mixed up jumble of bones from various different animals. It was likely that this was where the name of the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] ''[[Manticore]]'' originated.

{{Creature-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Manticore.png|thumb|right|250px|A manticore.]]
The manticore is the name of a creature originating in [[Wikipedia:Persian mythology|Persian]] myth, spread to the West via the [[Wikipedia:Greek mythology|Greeks]]. It possessed a red leonine body, a human head with three sharp rows of teeth, and a [[Scorpion/Legends|scorpion's]] tail capable of shooting venomous spines.
